name: SIOS Corporation
summary: SIOS Corporation engages in the open system infrastructure and application businesses. It offers LifeKeeper, a software that automatically recovers system failures in the cloud; OSS-related products; and Sios OSS Yorozu Consultation Office, a service for various inquiries about OSS, and consulting services for various information systems. The company also provides software products for multi-function peripheral, which are management support systems for financial institution; S-S Gluegent series of cloud services; and contract development of corporate information systems, and consulting services for various information systems. In addition, it engages in the development, building, and operation of information systems; software development, sales, and maintenance; and cloud services development. The company was formerly known as SIOS Technology, Inc. and changed its name to SIOS Corporation in October 2017. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
